  1. 2026 Example Project project A placeholder project so the canvas has a node to burst. Edit or replace it in /keystatic.

writing

  • Why My Site Is a Canvas Jun 30, 2026 The thinking behind navigating a portfolio through a node graph instead of a menu.
👋

about

hey — i'm wayleem.

i build web things, poke at markets, and tinker with whatever's interesting that week. i like small tools, clean type, and shipping stuff that's a little weird. this site is a map — each node is a room; go have a look.

now: building this site, trading a little, learning whatever the current rabbit hole demands.
